round_status_reason: 5 of 6 ready-for-asset-import candidates imported. C-06 Smithsonian NMNH Botany catalog 1529703 could not be downloaded: candidate media URL paths returned HTTP 404 (NMNH Ke Emu collection system does not expose a stable per-item media URL for the catalog number recorded in v4.4b evidence). Per brief rule, no unverified replacement image was substituted. See docs/IMPORTED_ASSET_INVENTORY_v4.5.md and docs/ASSET_IMPORT_v4.5.md for details.
deployment_status_definition: Repository-only assets. Not linked into site/index.html, site/script.js, site/style.css, second-exhibition/site/, or any live URL. Not deployed to GitHub Pages. Not associated with any tag or GitHub Release.

assets.institution: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History / NMNH Botany
assets.expected_taxon: Aconitum bulbilliferum (per v4.4b evidence; not independently re-verified in v4.5 round)
assets.record_url_attempted_note: The irn value 2793935 in the v4.4b evidence maps to an NMNH Botany record whose page <title> reads 'Rhynchanthus longiflorus, Myitkyina, Myanmar', not the Aconitum bulbilliferum taxon recorded in v4.4b evidence. The relationship between catalog number 1529703 and irn 2793935 could not be confirmed during v4.5 download verification.
assets.rights_basis: Smithsonian Open Access / CC0 1.0 — dataset-level only. No per-item evidence was confirmed during v4.5 download verification because no per-item media URL could be retrieved.
assets.blocked_reason: Candidate media URL paths returned HTTP 404 (NMNH Ke Emu collection system does not expose a stable per-item media URL for catalog 1529703). Per brief: 'Do not substitute search thumbnails, cached images, or third-party mirrors when source/rights verification fails' and 'When a candidate fails, only retain passing items and emit PARTIAL'.
assets.remaining_caution: v4.5b must (a) re-derive the correct irnstamp for catalog 1529703 from a fresh NMNH Botany search, (b) confirm the on-page taxon matches Aconitum bulbilliferum, (c) obtain a stable per-item media URL, and (d) re-record dataset-level CC0 1.0 basis from the live si.edu Terms page.
